name: Beef Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix well until evenly distributed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a tightly covered glass jar.
4. Use as needed when seasoning beef dishes.
5. Do not add additional salt to the dish, as this mix already contains salt.
6. Store leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 1 month.
7. Label the jar with its contents for easy reference.
